title: LinkedIn Profile Scraper
description: Scrape LinkedIn profiles and send to processing webhook

customer_name.title: Customer Name
customer_name.description: Customer or project name. A separate Google Drive folder will be created for this customer.

customer_email.title: Customer Email
customer_email.description: Customer email address to send the completed report to.

service_name.title: Service Name
service_name.description: Name of the service being requested.

service_request_tag_name.title: Service Request Tag
service_request_tag_name.description: Tag or category for this request.

linkedin_urls.title: LinkedIn Profile URLs
linkedin_urls.description: Add LinkedIn profile URLs one by one, or use the bulk upload option below.

bulk_upload_csv.title: Bulk Upload (CSV/Sheet URL)
bulk_upload_csv.description: Optional: Paste a Google Sheet URL or CSV download link containing LinkedIn URLs in the first column.

google_service_account_json.title: Google Service Account JSON
google_service_account_json.description: Paste your Google Service Account JSON key here to enable Google Drive saving.

drive_folder_id.title: Google Drive Root Folder ID
drive_folder_id.description: The ID of the root Google Drive folder where customer subfolders will be created.

poll_interval_minutes.title: Poll Interval (minutes)
poll_interval_minutes.description: How often to check the stats webhook for completion status.
